context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance optimization batch fully verified. Key files: server.py (BLOCK 447 indexes at lines 131-141), image_proxy.py (cache size 200, Cache-Control headers), App.js (React.lazy imports lines 44-75, Suspense at line 146), sw.js (PREFETCH_IMAGES handler lines 106-120), DailyPrompt.js (carousel prefetch lines 59-78), PromptArchiveDrawer.js (shimmer skeletons lines 175-195, prefetch lines 147-151), imagePrefetch.js (dedup utility).
